no_matches_try_a_different_keyword: No matches. Try a different keyword.
lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: conservation of mass. Trick is the coefficient (NOT the subscript). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Balance metals first, then non-metals, then hydrogen, then oxygen.
synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Synthesis (A+B→AB), decomposition (AB→A+B), single replace (A+BC→AC+B), double replace (AB+CD→AD+CB), combustion (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). 95% of high-school equations fit one of these.
1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: 1 mole = 6.022×10²³ particles (Avogadro). Molar mass = sum of atomic masses. Grams → moles → moles → grams. The bridge between balanced equations and lab quantities.
vsepr_predicts_shape_linear_trigonal_p: VSEPR predicts shape: linear, trigonal planar, tetrahedral, trigonal pyramidal, bent. Lone pairs occupy more space than bonded pairs. CH₄ is a perfect tetrahedron, NH₃ is a slightly squashed one.
lab_safety_ghs_symbols_emergency_respo: Lab Safety — GHS symbols + emergency response
9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: 9 GHS pictograms: explosive, flammable, oxidizer, gas pressure, corrosive, toxic, irritant, environmental hazard, health hazard. Acid into water (never reverse) — splashes are violent.
beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Beginner = naming + counting atoms; Intermediate = balancing; Advanced = mole math + limiting reagent. AP Chem topics 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Speed builds automaticity. Once balancing + naming are automatic, your working memory is free for higher-order reasoning like predicting product formation and equilibrium shifts.
k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: matter is stuff. 3-5: matter cycles. MS: atoms + simple compounds. HS: full periodic-table reasoning. AP: thermodynamics + kinetics + equilibrium. The vertical alignment runs through every grade.
autobalance_hint: Type your own reactants and products. Solved exactly by atom-conservation math — the AI tutor is never the authority on coefficients.
already_balanced_note: You typed it already balanced — nice.
balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Balance one element at a time • Start with the most complex compound • Save O or H for last
yield_hint: Type a reaction, then enter how many grams of each reactant you have.
protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Protect your eyes from splashes, fumes, and debris. Put goggles on before starting and keep them on until cleanup is complete.
nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Nitrile gloves protect against most lab chemicals. Replace immediately if torn or contaminated.
use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Use the wafting technique: hold the container away and gently wave the air toward your nose with your hand.
chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Chemical contamination is invisible. Even trace amounts on hands or surfaces can be ingested.
wash_thoroughly_with_soap_and_water_fo: Wash thoroughly with soap and water for at least 20 seconds, even if you wore gloves.
before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Before starting any lab, locate the nearest fire extinguisher, eyewash station, safety shower, and exits.
no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: No matter how small. Your teacher needs to know so proper cleanup and safety measures can be taken.
test_your_chemistry_knowledge_across_3: Test your chemistry knowledge across 3 difficulty levels!
a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: A rogue element is destabilizing the compound! Answer chemistry questions to restore stability!
answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Answer correctly to deal damage. Wrong answers destabilize your compound!
20_chemistry_careers_spanning_research: 20+ chemistry careers spanning research, industry, education, regulation.
what_you_now_have_access_to: 📚 What You Now Have Access To
chemistry_is_the_science_of_substances: Chemistry is the science of substances + their transformations.
every_atom_in_your_body_was_forged_in_: Every atom in your body was forged in a star.
every_reaction_you_observe_was_already: Every reaction you observe was already happening 4 billion years ago.
now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Now you have the tools to understand the world you're made of.
three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Three sliders: H⁺ exponent (log scale), buffer capacity, temperature. The solution shows one of five discrete pH bands. No score, no reveal — sweep and notice.
hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Hypothesis (free text — no right answer): How does buffer affect the H+ → pH relationship?
hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Hold two sliders steady. Move the third. Watch what happens.
what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: What happens to pure water (H⁺ exp = -7) as you change temperature?
find_two_settings_producing_the_same_b: Find two settings producing the same band. What do they share?
investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Investigate: why is the pH scale logarithmic?
i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: I think I understand — explain in own words
explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Explain how H⁺ concentration, buffering, and temperature jointly determine pH.
design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Design note: discrete 5-band pH marker; no numeric optimization target; no reveal — by design.
